## Summary
<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change
<!-- Check all that apply. -->
- [ ] `feat:` new user-visible feature
- [ ] `fix:` user-visible bug fix
- [ ] `docs:` documentation only
- [ ] `test:` tests only
- [ ] `ci:` CI / workflow changes
- [ ] `chore:` maintenance, dep bumps, internal refactor
- [ ] `style:` formatting / lint only (no logic change)
- [ ] `refactor:` restructuring without behavior change

## Checklist
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] `cd test && npm run test:unit` passes locally.
- [ ] `cd test && npm run test:integration` passes locally *(or N/A — explain why)*.
- [ ] Extension manifest (`package.json` at the repo root) still has **zero runtime dependencies**.
- [ ] No new network calls outside `127.0.0.1`.
- [ ] No telemetry, analytics, or remote logging introduced.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under the relevant `[Unreleased]` section (for user-visible changes).

<!-- How did you verify this works? Manual steps, screenshots, recordings. -->

<!-- e.g. Closes #42, Refs #17 -->
